name: Compagnie Lebon
summary: Compagnie Lebon engages in the hotel, private equity, real estate, and thermal bath businesses in France. It acquires the majority or minority stakes in the capital of unlisted small and medium-sized companies; restructures, repositions, and develops medium/long-term leased assets and leased or vacant assets, as well as purchases and resells leased assets. The company is also involved in the acquisition, renovation, and management of hotels; and management and animation of the 47 members labelled hotels and residences Esprit de France, as well as operates spa resort under the Brides-les-Bains name. As of December 31, 2019, it operated 13 hotels. The company was founded in 1847 and is based in Paris, France. Compagnie Lebon is a subsidiary of France Participations Sa.
